name: Merchynt
description:
With Merchynt, you can provide your clients with a complete range of reputation management services, all under your own brand for seamless integration. Their white-label offering covers both listings management and review management, giving you a unified and customizable dashboard.

Source: G2

Features:

➡️Partners can manage clients' business listings across various online directories, search engines, and platforms from a centralized location.

➡️Offers the flexibility to manage listings and reviews and grant clients direct access to a customized portal.

➡️Partners can streamline the review generation process using SMS, QR codes, and email campaigns.

Benefits:

✅Clients can gather more reviews on Google Maps and other popular search platforms.

✅Access to a Partner Hub provides partners with marketing materials, sales scripts, and promotional videos to accelerate sales and promotion efforts.

✅They offer a reseller-focused customer service 

✅Offers a comprehensive suite of resources, especially for marketers 

Cons:

❌Lacks AI-powered automation for managing reviews and crafting responses.

❌Limited analytics and reporting means you won't get genuine insights into the customer experience.

Pricing starts at 60$ Per Month
what_people_say:
“I have been working with Merchynt as a partner for 1 month now and I am blown away by the results, and response rate. They have consistently answered all my questions and my clients are getting great results. Justin and his team have exceeded my expectations! I am so grateful to have such an amazing support team I wouldn't be able to run my business without them.”

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
